params.name: Jade Ruyi
params.description: This is the Jade Ruyi always held by the God of Prosperity. Its shape resembles a long-handled hook, with a flat head like a shell and a smooth surface. Ruyi symbolizes good luck, and the God of Prosperity is the deity in charge of fame and fortune.
